title: A person can re-submit a member join request after their previous one was rejected (or their invitation was cancelled)
description: The public endpoint POST /v1/public/member-join-requests must allow re-submission for the same (email, organization_id) pair once the previous request is no longer PENDING (e.g. REJECTED). Only PENDING requests block re-submission; APPROVED or REJECTED ones do not.

given.backendState: organization exists with a REJECTED member join request for resubmit@example.com
